name: Movement Speed Steal — [Savagehorn Exclusive]
effect: Hitting enemy has 5/10/15% chance to steal 6% Movement Speed for 10s, max 5 stacks

name: Attack Speed Steal — [Wildwolf Exclusive]
effect: Hitting enemy has 5/10/15% chance to steal 5% Attack Speed for 10s, max 5 stacks

name: Sleight of Hand
effect: 15/20/25% chance to not consume the item when firing an arrow or using a throwable

name: Multi-Throw
effect: 10/15/20% chance to throw several extras when using a throwable

name: Throw Dodge
effect: Dodging automatically throws an equipped Throwing Axe/Knife/Spear at an enemy within 10/15/15m (highest tier also inflicts a 5-sec 50% Slow on hit)

name: Grapple-Throw
effect: Hitting a target with a Throwing Axe/Knife/Spear pulls them towards / to character's side / and prevents rolling for 5s (depending on tier)

name: Resonant Burst — Attack
effect: Hitting enemy has 10/15/20% chance to boost lower of Crit Rate/Crit Resist by 30% of higher for 12s (CD: 60/45/30s)

name: Burst Alteration — Attack
effect: Hitting enemy has 5/10/15% chance to convert all current Crit Resist into Crit Rate at 50% ratio for 12s (CD: 60/45/30s)

name: Resonant Burst — Defense
effect: Defending has 15/20/25% chance to boost lower of Crit Rate/Crit Resist by 30% of higher for 12s (CD: 60/45/30s)

name: Burst Alteration — Defense
effect: Defending has 10/15/20% chance to convert 50% of current Crit Rate into Crit Resist for 12s (CD: 60/45/30s)

name: Opportunistic Chain Strike
effect: Successfully Dodging grants 1 stack of "Chain Strike" for 3s; next Backstab with Weapon deals extra hits per stack. Max 2/3/4 stacks.

name: Soulflame Sniping — [Hunter Exclusive]
effect: While charging a bow, HP continuously drains; arrows deal additional damage equal to 50/75/100% of HP lost. Highest tier: perfect-timing fires greatly boost the effect (Damage cap: 100% Max HP).

name: Intimidating Strike
effect: 5/10/15% chance on melee hit to inflict Dread for 6s (target's single-hit DMG capped at 300; reduced vs Bosses) (CD: 25/20/15s)

name: Prime Battle Spirit
effect: At full HP and Resilience, hitting an enemy grants 4/6/8s "Offense is the Best Defense": attacks can't be reflected, and any weapon can reflect (CD: 25s)

name: Swiftness Alteration — Attack
effect: Hitting enemy has 5/10/15% chance to convert 25% of Movement Speed into Attack Speed for 12s (CD: 60/45/30s)

name: Skillful Hand — [Wildwolf Exclusive]
effect: As a craftsman, 5/10% chance to add 1-2 extra stats when crafting a weapon

name: Masterwork Armor — [Savagehorn Exclusive]
effect: As a craftsman, 5/10% chance to add 1-2 extra stats when crafting gear

name: Armorer's Focus — [Craftsman Exclusive]
effect: Exceptionally focused crafting armor: high-quality chance +5/7.5/10%

name: Weaponsmith's Focus — [Craftsman Exclusive]
effect: Exceptionally focused forging weapons: high-quality chance +5/7.5/10%

name: Weapon Maintenance — [Wildwolf Exclusive]
effect: Repair weapons with −20/35/50% durability cost

name: Armor Maintenance — [Savagehorn Exclusive]
effect: Repair armor with −20/35/50% durability cost

name: Tool Maintenance — [Craftsman Exclusive]
effect: Repairer tool durability cost −20/35%

name: Slow Pace
effect: Movement Speed −5/10/15%

name: Weak Attack
effect: Attack Speed −5/10/15%

name: Injury Worsening
effect: DMG taken +3/6/9%

name: Poor Health
effect: Max HP −3/6/9%

name: Heavy Footsteps
effect: Footfall noise volume +40/70/100%

name: World-shaking
effect: All sounds you produce are amplified +40/70/100% (a defect — same in/out perception)

name: Suspicious Behavior
effect: When spotted by enemies, Vigilance +20/40/60%

name: Slow-witted
effect: Body's chance to react to danger −10/15/20%

name: No Load Wanted
effect: Max Load −20/40/60%

name: Prone to Hunger
effect: Max Satiety −20/30/40%

name: Prone to Thirst
effect: Max Hydration −20/30/40%

name: Short Sight
effect: View distance −3/5/10 meters

name: Poor Hearing
effect: Can only hear sounds 5/10/15 dB louder than average (worse hearing)

name: Thick Blood
effect: Natural HP Recovery −30/50/70%

name: Stamina Depleted
effect: Stamina Recovery −20/30/50%

name: Rapid Absorption
effect: Satiety Consumption +10/30/50%

name: Rapid Absorption
effect: Water Consumption +10/30/50%

name: Clumsy
effect: Stamina cost +10/20/30% for stamina-using actions

name: Poor in Melee Combat
effect: Damage to enemies within 5m −5/10/15%

name: Poor in Remote Attack
effect: Damage to enemies 20m away −5/10/15%

name: Born with Bad Luck
effect: Trigger chance of all talents −10/15/20%

name: Clumsy Footsteps
effect: Movement Speed −30/50/80% when aiming with bows

name: Slow Shooting
effect: Bow charge time +30/50/80%

name: Slow Reload
effect: Crossbow Tower / Ballista Reload Time +20/35/50%

name: Add Insult to Injury
effect: When HP < 30%, lose extra 10/15/20% HP within 10s (CD: 50s)

name: Flame Fear
effect: When ignited, Burn effects amplified, damage dealt −20/25/30%

name: Flame of Friendship
effect: When ignited, spreads flames to nearby allies within 1/2/3m (a defect — friendly-fire ignition)

name: Slow Bandaging
effect: Bandage Time +30/40/50% (Lv 3-only entry)

name: Devious Heart
effect: When betraying the tribe, may take 1/2/3 Tribesmen with low Recognition along
